name: kdd-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ACM SIGKDD (KDD) submissions: Research vs Applied Data Science track selection, dual-cycle OpenReview submission, rebuttal without hyperlinks, Resubmit-decision strategy, ACM sigconf formatting, TAPS camera-ready, reproducibility, and deployment evidence. Grounded in official KDD 2026 track CFPs and OpenReview groups checked on 2026-07-08.
